=== hello_world
# Simple text render: game writes a string at the top-left.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
player_id: alice
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Hello, " + playerID + "!", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Hello, alice!     ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== fill_row
# Game fills the entire first row with dashes.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 3
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        var row = "";
        for (var i = 0; i < w; i++) row += "-";
        buf.writeString(0, 0, row, null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║------------------║
╚══════════════════╝

=== multiline
# Game writes on multiple rows.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Row 0", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 1, "Row 1", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 2, "Row 2", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Row 0             ║
║Row 1             ║
║Row 2             ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== fewer_rows
# Game writes fewer rows than the content height; remaining rows stay blank.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Row 0", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 1, "Row 1", null, null);
        // Row 2 omitted — should remain blank.
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Row 0             ║
║Row 1             ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== more_rows_clipped
# Game writes at y >= h; excess writes must be discarded and must not
# corrupt the bottom border.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Row 0", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 1, "Row 1", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 2, "Row 2", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 3, "OVERFLOW", null, null); // y == h → must be ignored
        buf.writeString(0, 4, "OVERFLOW", null, null); // y > h → must be ignored
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Row 0             ║
║Row 1             ║
║Row 2             ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== short_line
# A line shorter than the content width; remaining cells stay blank.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 3
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Hi", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Hi                ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== long_line_clipped
# A line longer than the content width must be clipped and must not
# overwrite the right border.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 3
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ1234", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR║
╚══════════════════╝

=== setchar_beyond_bounds
# setChar calls outside the viewport bounds must be silently ignored
# and must not corrupt the border.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "OK", null, null);
        buf.setChar(w,     0, "X", null, null); // x == w → beyond right edge
        buf.setChar(0,     h, "Y", null, null); // y == h → beyond bottom edge
        buf.setChar(w + 1, 0, "Z", null, null); // x > w
        buf.setChar(0, h + 1, "W", null, null); // y > h
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║OK                ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== dim_mismatch_combo
# Combination: short row, exact-fit row, long row (clipped), and rows
# beyond h (ignored) — borders must remain intact throughout.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    renderAscii: function(state, me, cells) { var buf = cells, playerID = me.id, x = 0, y = 0, w = cells.width, h = cells.height;
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "AB", null, null);                         // short
        var dashes = ""; for (var i = 0; i < w; i++) dashes += "-";
        buf.writeString(0, 1, dashes, null, null);                       // exact fit
        buf.writeString(0, 2, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", null, null); // too long
        buf.writeString(0, 3, "IGNORED", null, null);                    // y == h
        buf.setChar(0, h + 1, "!", null, null);                          // y > h
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║AB                ║
║------------------║
║ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR║
╚══════════════════╝
